---
title: "Step 4 - Pangaea"
---

Pangaea is Lilly's RWE/RWD knowledge management system. Note the **different URLs, training requirements, and ServiceNow form names** between FTEs and Vendors.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Pre-requisite Training

**Lilly FTE** 

- 9182923 — Pangaea Overview & Getting Started.

**Vendor / Contractor** 

-   9182923 — Pangaea Overview & Getting Started
-   9282629 — Working with Pangaea REQUESTS
-   9282637 — Working with Pangaea PROJECTS
-   9513570 — RWD: STRADA Platform — Analyzing Data

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Pangaea Support Team

| Contact | Role | Email |
|---------|------|-------|
| Lisa Grey | General Information/System Owner, Operations, Reporting, Training | grey_lisa_m@lilly.com |
| Heidi Cline | Project/Study Support, RIM/MedComms Vault | davis_heidi@lilly.com |
| Prix Berry | HEOR TPO Management | berry_prix@lilly.com |
| David Ott | HEOR Project Management, HEOR Financials | david.ott@lilly.com |
| Karen Morgan | HEOR Business Operations | morgan_karen_sue@lilly.com |

### Lilly FTE

1.  [ServiceNow](https://lilly.service-now.com) → search **Pangaea request form**. Do **not** request Manager access.

2.  Select **Contributing User** and **STRADA Member** under RWE Request Related Roles.

3.  Order Now → Check Out.

4.  After approval: [gso.lightning.force.com](https://gso.lightning.force.com/lightning/o/Dashboard/home)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Vendor / Contractor

1.  [ServiceNow](https://lilly.service-now.com) → search **"RWE-IT BUIT Pangaea Support Consulting Request"** (different form from FTE).

2.  Complete all four courses before submitting.

3.  After approval: [gso--c.vf.force.com/apex/PANG_HomePage](https://gso--c.vf.force.com/apex/PANG_HomePage) → click **Log in with GSO**.

::: {.callout-warning}
### Note
Vendor Pangaea URL differs from the FTE URL. Bookmarking the wrong link is a common source of confusion.
:::

---

*Content or technical issues with this site? [Click here](maintenance.qmd) to report any issues or provide feedback.*
